{{Missing Info}}

= Summer Fest =
[[File:Summer Fest Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Summer Fest]]
Jun. 28 2024 - Jul. 11 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=75<br>
https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=80
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =

= Home Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Ultra Shrine|black|Home Decoration}} (Home Decoration)

[[Category:Events]]
